bead.title: post-review: reviewer-unavailable holds (not park); lone block needs evidence/quorum (D6)
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The adversarial post-merge review step fabricates failures two ways: (a) a reviewer that cannot be ROUTED (OutcomeReviewReviewerUnavailable / transport) parks a landed-eligible candidate to operator-required after ReviewMaxRetries (applyReviewOperatorRequiredParking in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go); (b) reducePreCloseReviewGroup returns the FIRST non-APPROVE verdict, so a single spurious BLOCK/REQUEST_CHANGES overrides approving reviewers. Re-pin lines against HEAD.

ROOT CAUSE
Reviewer unavailability (an infra/routing condition) is treated as a quality verdict; and a lone dissent auto-blocks without evidence or quorum.

PROPOSED FIX (fail open on unavailability; require evidence for a block)
1. Reviewer UNAVAILABLE after retries: hold/retry-with-backoff, or land with a degraded-review note — never terminal-park a landed-eligible candidate on a routing failure.
2. Reviewer DISAGREEMENT: a BLOCK must cite a concrete location/AC to count; a lone dissent among approvals goes to a tie-break/quorum rule (e.g. majority, or one more reviewer) rather than auto-block.

NON-SCOPE: do not weaken a well-formed BLOCK that cites a real AC/location.

ACCEPTANCE
1. New test: reviewer-routing failure (OutcomeReviewReviewerUnavailable) after ReviewMaxRetries does NOT applyReviewOperatorRequiredParking on a landed-eligible candidate (holds/retries instead).
2. New test: APPROVE + a single evidence-less BLOCK does not auto-block (tie-break/quorum applies); APPROVE + a BLOCK that cites a location does block.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
